eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 10:41 PM ON APR 13, 2026 Effective until 06:41 AM APR 14, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Mesa Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Mesa PD is looking for 16-year-old male, Desi Zunich. Desi walked away from his caretaker's residence and has not been found. He is diagnosed with various cognitive disorders and is prone to seizures. Desi was last seen near 2nd Street and Alma School Rd in Mesa on 04/13/2026 at 5:30 p.m. He is 5'10" tall, 180 lbs with black hair, brown eyes and was last seen wearing a blue shirt, black shorts and grey shoes. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
